notes: Mixed-bitrate quantization format native to the ExLlamaV2 (turboderp) local-LLM inference library; the name is a contraction of ExLlamaV2 (EX-L + 2). Spelled out letter-by-letter "E-X-L-TWO" in local-LLM communities, not read as "excel-two". STRESS on TWO. File extension/suffix seen as .exl2 on Hugging Face quants.
